rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in component type scopes and implementation annexes in implementation scopes
Use only visible identifiers from the current target component or its type
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component structure from the input AADL model
Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use only visible identifiers from the current target component or its type
Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in valid component type scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use AADL property names directly as AGREE variables
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
